title: Microsoft plans aggressive maneuvers to gain an edge in fight for AI agent market share | MSDynamicsWorld.com
full_text: # Microsoft plans aggressive maneuvers to gain an edge in fight for AI agent market share. Dynamics Communities Biz Apps Partner Executive Summit 2025. One company representative at the Biz Apps Partner Executive Summit 2025 event last week stated that their SaaS agent framework, Copilot Studio, delivered 2025 Q4 revenue of $18 million. To grow that number in FY26 company representatives at the event discussed their plans to build a library of pre-built agents to offer organizations and to roll out a corps of Forward Deployed Engineers, or FDEs. * ***See also:*** Biz Apps Partner Executive Summit 2025: Microsoft urges partners to embrace AI internally to win in the market. Microsoft will join the trend with an offer to bring FDEs into a customer environment for a fixed time period, between four weeks and ninety days, to complete up to five agents that are agreed on with the customer. Biz Apps Partner Executive Summit 2025 Copilot Copilot Studio Customer Engagement Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations Microsoft Corporate Power Platform. / score=0.329 / query=FDE AI implementation production rollout / intent=find_original_source / path=fde_implementation

# Microsoft plans aggressive maneuvers to gain an edge in fight for AI agent market share.
Dynamics Communities Biz Apps Partner Executive Summit 2025.
One company representative at the Biz Apps Partner Executive Summit 2025 event last week stated that their SaaS agent framework, Copilot Studio, delivered 2025 Q4 revenue of $18 million.

To grow that number in FY26 company representatives at the event discussed their plans to build a library of pre-built agents to offer organizations and to roll out a corps of Forward Deployed Engineers, or FDEs.
* ***See also:*** Biz Apps Partner Executive Summit 2025: Microsoft urges partners to embrace AI internally to win in the market.

company_actions: # Microsoft plans aggressive maneuvers to gain an edge in fight for AI agent market share.
Dynamics Communities Biz Apps Partner Executive Summit 2025.

To grow that number in FY26 company representatives at the event discussed their plans to build a library of pre-built agents to offer organizations and to roll out a corps of Forward Deployed Engineers, or FDEs.
